goals.title: ~/.oh-my-agent-env는 사용자가 다른 머신에서도 같은 설정으로 작업을 할 수 있도록 설정을 진행하는 custom...
goals.objective: ~/.oh-my-agent-env는 사용자가 다른 머신에서도 같은 설정으로 작업을 할 수 있도록 설정을 진행하는 custom package이다. 이전에 논의된 방향으로 ~/.oh-my-agent-env의 구성을 조사하고 setup/sync/doctor 구조를 재현성, idempotency, runtime parity 기준으로 정리하는 작업을 수행하라. 혹시 실수를 할 수 도 있으니 복구 가능성을 위해 먼저 현재 상태 git commit 후 작업을 진행.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/data happy path: refactor lands with setup/sync/doctor source graph still loading, command dispatcher intact, and documented domain boundaries visible in file tree and README/plan artifacts.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/C001-structure-and-load.txt containing git diff summary, file tree of lib domains, and bash -n setup.sh lib/**/*.sh success output.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/C001-structure-and-load.txt: lib/sync and lib/doctor domain tree present; bash -n and smoke-refactor OK | cleanup: no long-running process; closed reviewer agent 019ee8cd-08fc-7ae2-8985-a4e02127a2db

successCriteria.scenario: CLI edge/reproducibility path: after the refactor, run repeated shell load/syntax checks and isolated HOME command checks that prove setup/sync/doctor files can be parsed without real-home mutation, while documenting any intentionally skipped destructive/network action.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/C002-idempotency-repro.txt containing two consecutive bash -n/load runs, isolated HOME validation transcript, git diff showing no unintended real-home writes from those checks, and skipped destructive/network checks with reasons.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/C002-idempotency-repro.txt: repeated bash -n OK; isolated HOME sync --skip-network and validate OK; temp HOME removed | cleanup: temp HOME removed; no long-running process; reviewer closed

successCriteria.scenario: Regression/runtime parity path: after the refactor, run existing user-facing commands and runtime checks: setup.sh validate, setup.sh doctor, LazyCodex/omo doctor output inspection, and graphify update or an explicit documented blocker.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/C003-runtime-parity-regression.txt containing setup.sh validate output, setup.sh doctor output summary including LazyCodex/omo lines, graphify update output or blocker, and final git status/diff summary.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/C003-runtime-parity-regression.txt: setup.sh validate OK; doctor rc 0 and LazyCodex omo@sisyphuslabs OK; graphify update attempted and blocked by graphify safety refusal after vendor ignore reduced node count | cleanup: no long-running process; graphify produced no overwrite; reviewer closed

goals.evidence: C001-C003 pass; quality gate approved; commits e0a5fe4, b280271, f812072; worktree clean.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019ee8a8-98ac-7120-b232-0f80ba39d095/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019ee8a8-98ac-7120-b232-0f80ba39d095/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

aggregateCompletion.evidence: C001-C003 pass; quality gate approved; commits e0a5fe4, b280271, f812072; worktree clean.
